items.gloss: time (three times, each time, etc.); times

degree (angle, temperature, scale, etc.); counter for occurrences; strength (of glasses); glasses prescription; alcohol content (percentage); alcohol by volume; extent; degree; limit; presence of mind; composure
often; again and again; over and over again; repeatedly; frequently
